# WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.EAPType

**Enumeration**

The EAP types allowed for this network

## Declaration

```swift
enum EAPType
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.EAPType.eapFAST**: The value that indicates the system allows the Flexible Authentication via Secure Tunneling Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP-FAST) for this network.
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.EAPType.eapTLS**: The value that indicates the system allows the Transport Layer Security Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP-TLS) for this network.
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.EAPType.eapTTLS**: The value that indicates the system allows the Tunneled Transport Layer Security Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP-TTLS) for this network.
- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.EAPType.peap**: The value that indicates the system allows the Protected Extensible Authentication Protocol (PEAP) for this network.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
